principles.raw_data_policy: Raw JSONL/JSONL.GZ captures are immutable. All fixes, patches, features, and LOB reconstructions are derived outputs.
principles.patch_policy: Backups are used conservatively to fill detected primary capture gaps. Full duplicate stream merges are diagnostic only unless explicitly promoted.
principles.audit_policy: Daily outputs must include SHA256 hashes for raw inputs, derived outputs, scripts, and this config file.

binance_backup.continuity_rule: Independent backup stream checked with official Binance U/u sequence continuity.

coinbase.continuity_rule: Timestamp, snapshot, segment, and backup-patch based checks because Coinbase Exchange level2 messages do not provide Binance-style U/u IDs.

coinbase_backup.continuity_rule: Independent backup stream checked with timestamp, snapshot, segment, and backup-patch based checks.

notes: This config describes the current beta data-engineering pipeline, not final thesis model parameters.
Changing this file changes the config SHA256 recorded in future daily manifests.
